name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Pouch - Chicken Chunks in Gravy 100g
description: Reflex Plus Chicken Chunks in Gravy Adult Cat Food in Pouch , fully-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Cellulose (Fiber) (%) - 0.3 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 2 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -?1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20 ?g/kg Manganese - 1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (5% chicken), cereals, minerals, inulin (0,1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
